---
title: "animated_figure_drafts"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(gganimate)
library(rgl)
library(rayshader)
library(rlang)
library(plotly)
library(ggimage)
```

```{r}
coral <- read_csv(here::here("..", "eds-coral-data-storage-management", "analysisdata", "coral_demography_analysis_data.csv"), guess_max = 10000)
```
```{r}
# coral_colors <- c(
#     Acr = "blue", 
#     Poc = "red", 
#     Por = "darkgreen", 
#     Mil = "darkorange",
#     dead = "grey"
#   )
coral_colors <- c(
  "Poc" = "#F4A6C0",  # light pink
  "Por" = "#D4A017",  # gold
  "Acr" = "#E63946",  # light red
   "Mil" = "#FF7F2A",
    "Dead" = "grey2",
  "Recruit" = "green"
)


```


```{r}

# vol %>% 
#   filter(site == "LTER1", habitat == "BR") %>% 
#   ggplot(aes(x,y_scaled, group = coral_number)) +
#   geom_point(aes(color = taxa, size = volume_scaled), show.legend = FALSE) +
#   scale_color_manual(values = coral_colors) +
#   facet_grid(taxa~transect) +
#   theme(aspect.ratio = 0.2) +
#   transition_states(year,
#     transition_length = 2,
#     state_length = 1) +
#   labs(title = 'Year: {closest_state}')
```

```{r}
# images <- list.files(path = here::here("animated_figures", "images"), pattern="png", full.names = TRUE, include.dirs =  TRUE)
# 
# img_df <- data.frame(taxa = c("Acr", "Mil", "Poc", "Por"),
#                      image = images)
# 
# coral_img <- left_join(coral_volume_mod, img_df)
```
```{r}
# coral_img %>% 
#   filter(site == "LTER1" & 
#            habitat == "BR" & 
#            transect == "T03" &
#            !is.na(length) &
#            taxa != "Por") %>%
#   ggplot(aes(x,y_scaled, group = coral_number)) +
#   geom_image(aes(image = image, size = volume)) +
#   theme_light() +
#   theme(aspect.ratio = 0.2) +
#   scale_size(range = c(0.02, 0.2), 
#            name = "Volume (cm³)",
#            trans = "log") +
#   theme_light() +
#   transition_states(year,
#     transition_length = 2,
#     state_length = 3) +
#   transition_states(year,
#     transition_length = 2,
#     state_length = 1) +
#   labs(title = 'Year: {closest_state}')
```

## POC FIG
Assign volumes to dead corals to visualize
```{r}

```

Denote dead and recruit corals
```{r}

```

Assign images
```{r}
# images_poc <- list.files(pattern="png", include.dirs =  TRUE)
# 
# img_df_poc <- data.frame(taxa_class = c("Acr", "Mil", "Poc_dead", "Poc_recruit", "Poc", "Por"),
#                      image = images_poc)
# 
# coral_poc_img <- left_join(poc_dyn, img_df_poc)
```

```{r}
coral_death <- coral %>% 
  group_by(coral_id) %>%
  arrange(coral_id, year) %>% 
  mutate(current_volume = case_when(
    is.na(size_t0) ~ size_t_minus1,
    TRUE~ size_t0
  ),
  survival = case_when(
    dyn_death == 1 ~ 0,
    is.na(l) ~ NA,
    TRUE ~ 1
  )) %>% 
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
coral_dyn <- coral_death %>% 
  mutate(taxa_class = case_when(
    dyn_death == 1 ~ "Dead",
    dyn_recruitment == 1 ~ "Recruit",
    TRUE ~ taxa
  ))
```

Create figure
```{r}
plot <- coral_dyn %>% 
  filter(x < 1 & 
           site == "LTER1" &
           habitat == "BR" & 
           transect == "T01" &
           !is.na(current_volume)
         ) %>% 
  mutate(y_m = y / 100) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x, y_m)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = taxa_class, size = current_volume + 5, group = coral_id)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = taxa, size = current_volume, group = coral_id)) +
  scale_size(range = c(0.01, 5), 
           name = "Volume (cm³)") +
  scale_color_manual(values = coral_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = coral_colors) +
  theme_light() +
  coord_fixed(ratio = 1) +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        title = element_text(size = 12))+
  labs(title = 'Year: {closest_state}') +
  transition_states(year,
    transition_length = 2,
    state_length = 3) +
  labs(title = 'Year: {closest_state}')

animate(plot,
        duration = 30,
        fps = 25, height = 500, width = 2500, res = 300)
```
